content: a filter based on tiers would be good.t0 stuff become useless in late gane

yeah i like the idea of “mark as junk” 

in D2 we could “pick up as junk” when actually picking the items off the floor. 

however, in D2 you could also inspect the items before licking them up, so that might be a bigger/out of scope effort.
yes agree, the filters both apply for inventory and npc for selling items

On that note it should also be possible to have a sell filter at the VENDOR when you SELL items e.g. I want to sell all T0 or T1  Gold items instead of ALL Gold items at once

and CLAIM all Purple Items or t0 items for selling  or T2 Items for inspection from the STASH. Etc...or as above mention claim all "marked as junk"

Filters at the vendor and stash also help you streamline the sorting process, people who grind Heroic Nest and Weekly Bounty for OS and T2 inbetween know what I'm referring too...

referenced_message.author: beltha
referenced_message.content:
Hi Dev Team,

First of all, thank you for your hard work on the game! To improve the endgame experience and streamline inventory management, it would be highly appreciated if we could get a comprehensive Inventory Filter System.

As we accumulate more loot, managing our inventory becomes a bit time-consuming. Having a system to filter weapons and gear based on the following criteria would be a massive quality-of-life improvement:

Tier Filter: Ability to filter gear by Tier (e.g., T0, T1, T2).

Core Attribute/Role Filter: A quick toggle to sort items based on their primary focus:

Firepower (DPS)

Toughness (Armor/Survival)

Engineering (Skill Power/Utility)

Item Types & Sets:

A breakdown by Weapon Types (Assault Rifles, SMGs, Shotguns, etc.).

A breakdown by Gear Sets / Brand Sets so we can easily find matching pieces for our builds.

Implementing these filtering options would save players a lot of time between missions and allow us to experiment with different builds much more efficiently.

Thank you for considering this feedback! Keep up the great work.

content:
OH HELL YES!

we 100% need mark as junk, but also pick up as junk!

1. Add "mark as junk"
2. Allow filtering based on item tier, rarity, damage type, core attributes, etc
100% agree with this! Simple rarity filters are mostly pointless when each rarity then has a tier also.

content: The most annoying thing is rifling through my inventory and attempting to sell or deconstruct duplicate weapons or gear because they do not populate in the inventory UI together. If I have more than one weapon I would prefer them to be next to eachother on the interface so I can compare easier rather than having to strain my eyeballs to find the others in the random mess.

This shouldn’t even be a question; of course more filters are needed. Especially considering how limited stash space is (purposely).  

It’s way too time consuming in its current iteration.
I would love to have a "Mark For Deconstruct" similar to D2.
